title: genista tinctoria subsp. delarbrei
intro: Genista tinctoria subsp. delarbrei, also known as dyer's greenweed, is a plant species in the legume family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Genista tinctoria subsp. delarbrei include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
